context: Tests whether the agent only uses valid Dawn heading_size values: h2, h1, h0, hxl, hxxl. Using invalid values (like 'large', 'xl', 'medium', 'small', 'h3', 'h4', or any others) causes theme check failures. All heading_size fields in the JSON must be from the allowed set.

checklist.name: All heading_size values are valid
checklist.description: Every heading_size value in templates/index.json is one of: h2, h1, h0, hxl, hxxl — verified across all sections and blocks

checklist.name: No invalid size strings
checklist.description: The strings 'large', 'medium', 'small', 'h3', 'h4', 'xl', 'xxl', 'heading-1', 'heading-2' do NOT appear as heading_size values in templates/index.json

checklist.name: Hero uses large heading (hxl or hxxl)
checklist.description: The hero image-banner's heading block (or equivalent) uses heading_size of 'hxl' or 'hxxl' — the largest options for the most prominent heading

checklist.name: How-it-works heading size valid
checklist.description: The how-it-works multicolumn section has an explicit heading_size setting with a valid value (h2, h1, h0, hxl, or hxxl)

checklist.name: Tier picker heading size valid
checklist.description: The tier picker multicolumn section has an explicit heading_size setting with a valid value (h2, h1, h0, hxl, or hxxl)

checklist.name: Testimonials heading size valid
checklist.description: The testimonials multicolumn section has an explicit heading_size setting with a valid value (h2, h1, h0, hxl, or hxxl)

checklist.name: FAQ heading size valid
checklist.description: The FAQ collapsible-content section has an explicit heading_size setting with a valid value (h2, h1, h0, hxl, or hxxl)

checklist.name: heading_size explicit in 5+ sections
checklist.description: At least 5 sections or blocks in templates/index.json have an explicit heading_size value set (not relying solely on defaults)

checklist.name: Full section structure present
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains all required sections: image-banner hero, custom-liquid anchors, how-it-works multicolumn, tiers multicolumn, collage, testimonials multicolumn, collapsible-content FAQ, newsletter email capture

checklist.name: Valid JSON
checklist.description: templates/index.json is valid JSON that can be parsed without errors
